zh.lifeSummary: 當Helen Bailie於大約1619年出生在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾曼諾時，她的父親James Bailie of Kailzia22歲，母親Catherine Ingles21歲。她於1641年與John Burnet of Kailzia在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾曼諾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1654年1月17日在英國蘇格蘭享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helen Bailie于大约1619年出生在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾曼諾时，她的父亲James Bailie of Kailzia22岁，母亲Catherine Ingles21岁。她于1641年与John Burnet of Kailzia在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾曼諾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1654年1月17日在英国苏格兰享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bailie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Baillie
meanings: from Older Scots baillie, baili. In Scotland, a baillie was a status name for any of various officials, including the chief magistrate in a barony and (later) the chief magistrate or administrative officer of a barony or district. Etymologically, this is the same word as English Bailey , but the functions as well as the spelling of the two officials were different in England and Scotland.
topographic name from Older Scots bailli ‘outer court of a castle’; see Bailey 3 and Bale 1.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: When Helen Bailie was born about 1619, in Manor, Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, James Bailie of Kailzia, was 22 and her mother, Catherine Ingles, was 21. She married John Burnet of Kailzia in 1641, in Manor, Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 17 January 1654, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

ja.lifeSummary: Helen Bailieが約1619年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアマノーで生まれた時，父James Bailie of Kailziaは22歳，母Catherine Inglesは21歳であった。1641年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアマノーでJohn Burnet of Kailziaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1654年1月17日にイギリススコットランドで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helen Bailie(이)가 대략 1619년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Bailie of Kailzia(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Ingles(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1641년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르 먼어에서 John Burnet of Kailzia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1654년 1월 17일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helen Bailie родилась около 1619 г. в местности манор, пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Bailie of Kailzia было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Ingles, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Burnet of Kailzia в 1641 г. в местности манор, пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 17 января 1654 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.
